scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,api,agents,workspace,graph,memory,automation,gateway,mcp -c blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow,red,white,gray "npm run dev -w @princy/frontend" "npm run dev -w @princy/api" "npm run dev -w @princy/agents" "npm run dev -w @princy/workspace-service" "npm run dev -w @princy/context-graph" "npm run dev -w @princy/memory-service" "npm run dev -w @princy/automation-service" "npm run dev -w @princy/gateway" "npm run dev -w @princy/mcp-server"
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,api,agents,workspace,graph,memory,automation,gateway,mcp -c blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow,red,white,gray "npm run start -w @princy/frontend" "npm run start -w @princy/api" "npm run start -w @princy/agents" "npm run start -w @princy/workspace-service" "npm run start -w @princy/context-graph" "npm run start -w @princy/memory-service" "npm run start -w @princy/automation-service" "npm run start -w @princy/gateway" "npm run start -w @princy/mcp-server"
scripts.build:vscode-extension: npm run build -w @princy/vscode-api-client && npm run build -w princy-assistant
scripts.package:vscode-extension: npm run build:vscode-extension && npm run package -w princy-assistant
